title: Form for building inspection with photos
excerpt: We are new to the platform and plan to use it related to real estate. We have a team that inspects our buildings and reports back findings. Would it be possible to use a form or something on here that would allow them to…

posts.author: georgemaka (george maka)
posts.cookedHtml: We are new to the platform and plan to use it related to real estate. We have a team that inspects our buildings and reports back findings. Would it be possible to use a form or something on here that would allow them to create a form and add pictures and tie it back to a task or building? Preferably in a PDF, but open to ideas.

posts.author: YannD (Yann Dehuy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @georgemaka
I use Kizeo forms connected with monday by make.com for reporting and tracking
Mobile Forms Application to capture data from the field - Kizeo Forms

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is a new-ish integration that connects items to other boards based on similar criteria here:

Connect Automation658×656 35.9 KB

The one downfall is that it is case sensitive and would require some human entry to make sure that the form and the item criteria is exactly the same.

Hope this helps!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @georgemaka! Let us know at support@monday.com if you still need help with this and we’d be happy to assist!
